query:
SELECT
            user_model.id,
            user_model.username,
            user_model.public_name
        FROM wiki_model 
        JOIN user_model ON wiki_model.user_id = user_model.id
        WHERE (wiki_model.id = $1 AND wiki_model.user_id = $2)
        OR (wiki_model.id = $1 AND wiki_model.is_public = true)
